tasks.instruction: Uzupelnij kazde z ponizszych zdan jednym pasujacym slowem. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Liczba kresek odpowiada liczbie brakujacych liter w wyrazie, a niektore litery zostaly juz podane.

items.stem: We keep the car in the g _ _ _ g e next to the house.
After cooking, my mum washes the dishes in the k _ _ c h e n.
I sleep upstairs in my own b _ _ r o o m.
Please open the w _ _ d o w to let some fresh air in.
When it is cold, we light a fire and sit beside the f _ r e p _ a c e.

items.stem: Wipe your feet on the mat before you walk across the c _ r p _ t.
We climb the s _ a _ r s to reach the bedrooms on the first floor.
In summer we have lunch outside on the b _ _ c o n y of our flat.
